Home / Service Areas / New Braunfels

Fencing in New Braunfels, TX

Trusted local professionals serving New Braunfels and surrounding communities

Serving New Braunfels, TX

Onyx Fencing proudly serves New Braunfels, TX, providing durable and stylish fencing solutions for the charming hill country stone homes in the area. Our expertise includes custom wood, wrought iron, and chain-link fencing designed to withstand the region's hot summers while enhancing curb appeal. Whether you need privacy fencing for your backyard or a decorative fence to complement your property, we deliver quality craftsmanship tailored to your needs. New Braunfels' unique blend of historic architecture and modern growth makes it an ideal location for premium fencing services.

Known for its beautiful hill country stone homes and hot summers, New Braunfels is a growing community with a mix of historic charm and new developments.

Fencing Services in New Braunfels

Cedar Fencing

Natural cedar fences that resist Texas heat and humidity.

Learn more →

Wrought Iron Fencing

Elegant yet secure metal fencing for South Texas estates.

Learn more →

Chain Link Fencing

Affordable, durable perimeter solutions for active families.

Learn more →

Vinyl Privacy Fencing

Low-maintenance solid barriers for bustling neighborhoods.

Learn more →

Pool Safety Barriers

Code-compliant protection for your swimming area.

Learn more →

Fence Repair Services

Restoring damaged fences to like-new condition.

Learn more →
